'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"\/atom.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=7OXv9EQu8EqywKa0tOMhUu_tFAp8x3ew49WaOmFGwe4-1773494882-1.0.1.1-a00GPEvMy0h26G4cg.pTBl4X11qspoN5_7PZmsp2umk"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
